title: InventorySearchResponse
description: Typed AAP response for the `inventory.search` skill. The `data` block contains pagination metadata, the matched vehicles, and OPTIONALLY an embedded Facets aggregation. Carried inside an A2A `Message.parts[].data` DataPart returned from the `SendMessage` operation.

total.description: Total number of vehicles matching the request (across all pages).

limit.description: Echo of the request's effective pagination.limit.

vehicles.description: Vehicles in this page, in the requested order.

facets.description: Optional aggregated facets over the matching set.

message.description: Optional contextual note. MAY be omitted.
